title: Generated Text
description: Generated text structured as a map with metadata.
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries the complete text generation result from an LLM cap, including the generated text and any associated metadata such as token counts, finish reason, and timing. This is the non-streaming counterpart to [LLM Text Stream](https://capdag.com/browse/media:llm-text-stream;ndjson).

## When to use
Use this type when a cap returns the full generated output in one shot rather than streaming tokens. Callers that do not need incremental delivery should prefer this simpler interface over the streaming variant.

## Notes
The outer object is a flat map; implementations should include at minimum a `text` or `generated_text` key containing the model output. Additional metadata keys such as `tokens_generated`, `finish_reason`, and `generation_time_ms` are recommended for observability.
